title: Biome Ore Generation
body:
I just wanted to create a datapack which enforced me to use the mods [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships), [Nifty Carts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts), and [Create (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) /  [Create (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

 

With this datapack every biome have one specific ore only and most have one specific stone, so you'll have to travel alot to get all the resources you need. Stone, gravel, coal, deepslate, sand + tuff can still be found in any overworld biome and netherrack will spawn everywhere in the biome. Just to be nice I've doubled all the spawns of all ores in their specific biome.

 
Here's a list of all the Resources and where to find them:

 
## Stones:

**Andesite**: Jungle + Forest + Cherry Grove + Taiga + Birch + Dark Forest + Flower Forest + Windswept Forest

**Diorite**: Plains + Snowy Plains + Meadow + Sunflower Plains

**Granite**: Snowy Taiga, Jungle + Bamboo Jungle + Sparse Jungle

**Clay**: Lush Caves + Swamp + Mangrove Swamp + Oceans + Frozen River + River

## Ores:

**Copper**: Forest + Flower Forest + Windswept Forest

**Iron**: Plains + Snowy Plains + Sunflower Plains

**Gold**: Desert + Badlands + Eroded Badlands + Savanna + Plateu + Windswept Savanna + Wooded Badlands

**Diamond**: Swamp + Mangroove Swamp + Snowy Taiga

**Redstone**: Cherry Grove + Dark Forest + Jungle + Bamboo Jungle + Sparse Jungle

**Lapis Lazuli**: Taiga + Birch Forest + Meadow + Old Growths

**Emerald**: Giant Tree Taiga + Mushroom Field + Frozen Peaks + Grove + Ice Spikes + Jagged Peaks + Snowy Slopes + Stony Peaks + Windswept Gravelly Hills + Windswept Hills

 

**Glowstone**: Nether Wastes

**Nether Quartz**: Warped Forest

**Ancient Debris**: Crimson Forest
